basic_details.job_title: NABCONS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for DEO, Integration Specialist and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Data Entry Operator / Project Assistant, Food Processing Expert, Finance Expert (Credit / Insurance), IT Infrastructure Expert, Integration Specialist – IT
basic_details.short_information: NABARD Consultancy Services (NABCONS) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 8 Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: All Posts: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits and relaxation details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any stream, Post Graduate, B.Tech, M.Tech, MCA, MBA Finance
qualification.details: Data Entry Operator / Project Assistant: Graduate in any stream, with 2-3 years of experience in similar roles. Food Processing Expert: Graduate / Post graduate in Food Processing or Graduate in Horticulture + PG degree/diploma in Food processing / agribusiness management, with 5-8 years experience. Experience in government projects preferred. Finance Expert (Credit / Insurance): Masters in Finance or MBA in Finance, with 5-8 years experience. Experience in agriculture credit or crop insurance sector is an advantage. Government project experience preferred. IT Infrastructure Expert: B.Tech / M.Tech / MCA in Computer Science / IT or related, with 5-10 years in IT infrastructure / e-governance / enterprise systems. Expertise in cloud (GovCloud/MeghRaj), servers, DBA, network security. Integration Specialist – IT: B.Tech / M.Tech / MCA in IT/CS or equivalent, with 5-8 years in system integration, API development, middleware. Proficiency in API gateways, microservices, JSON/XML, OAuth, Aadhaar-based auth.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NABCONS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NABCONS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies released by NABCONS?
faq.answer: NABCONS has released a total of 8 vacancies for various posts. This includes Data Entry Operator/Project Assistant, Food Processing Expert, Finance Expert, IT Infrastructure Expert, and Integration Specialist.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for the NABCONS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications for the NABCONS recruitment is 18th May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the NABCONS posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post. They range from a Graduate in any stream to Post Graduate, B.Tech, M.Tech, MCA, and MBA Finance, depending on the specific role applied for.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for NABCONS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this NABCONS recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for NABCONS jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for NABCONS recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these NABCONS positions?
faq.answer: The positions advertised by NABCONS are on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NABCONS recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for NABCONS recruitment typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview. The exact details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for NABCONS recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for NABCONS recruitment can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the vacancies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of NABCONS?
faq.answer: The official website of NABARD Consultancy Services (NABCONS) is www.nabcons.com. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to apply online.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific experience requirements for the posts?
faq.answer: Yes, most of the posts require specific years of experience. For example, Data Entry Operator/Project Assistant requires 2-3 years, while expert roles like Food Processing Expert and Finance Expert require 5-8 years of relevant experience.
